channel.title: Clojure on DP's place
channel.description: Recent content in Clojure on DP's place

item.title: clojure_programming
item.description: 001 doom emacs clojure mode에서 structure safe하게 coding하기 cleverparens라는 package를 이용하면 된다. ;; in ~/.doom.d/packages.el (package! evil-cleverparens) ;; in ~/.doom.d/config.el (add-hook 'lisp-mode-hook #'evil-cleverparens-mode) 위의 코드 출처 실제 코딩 시작 Syntax(문법) Forms 모든 Clojure code는 Uniform structure로 적혀있다. Clojure는 두 종류를 인식한다 Literal representations of data structures (numbers, strings, maps, and vectors) Operations We use the term form to refer to valid code. I’ll also sometimes use expression to refer to Clojure forms.

item.title: beginning of Clojure
item.description:
Clojure란?

Rich Hickey가 만든 Lisp의 방언격의 함수형 프로그래밍 언어.
